descriptionShort: Coach Orland Kurtenbach discusses Richmond Sockeyes' physical style ahead of Centennial Cup semifinal against Red Deer Rustlers.
descriptionLong: General manager-coach Orland Kurtenbach of the Richmond Sockeyes discusses the team's approach to the Western Canada Centennial Cup semifinal against the Red Deer Rustlers on April 7, 1987. The former NHL player emphasizes his preference for physical but clean hockey with good puck movement, describing his BC-champion team as "fairly aggressive overall" while avoiding excessive rough play.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Seek Tough Hockey in Centennial Cup Semifinal
